summary: In a 2012 letter to customers, Anne Wojcicki reflects on 23andMe's first five years and the evolution of its business model. She emphasizes that lowering upfront costs through subscriptions makes genetics more accessible, and frames consumer genetics as a lifelong partnership driven by community participation.

principles.statement: Lowering the upfront investment is essential to making personal genetics accessible to more people.
principles.rationale: High initial costs limit adoption; shifting to a subscription model with a lower entry price allows the service to reach a broader audience and rapidly grow the customer base.
principles.source_quote: Our hope was that lowering the upfront investment would make our service accessible to more people.

principles.statement: The community of users is what makes consumer genetics truly valuable.
principles.rationale: While individual DNA is unique, the collective participation of the community is what drives the service's value and helps define the field of personal genetics.
principles.source_quote: And while it’s our DNA that makes each of us unique as individuals, it’s you — the 23andMe community — that makes our service and the experience we offer so amazing.

mental_models.name: Genetics as a Life-long Partnership
mental_models.description: Viewing genetic testing not as a static, one-time transaction, but as an ongoing relationship where the service continuously updates as new scientific discoveries are made.
mental_models.example: Structuring the business model so the initial fee covers genotyping, while an ongoing subscription covers continuous DNA analysis, interpretation, and access to new proprietary tools.

signature_quotes.text: Each and every one of you — our 23andMe customers — is a pioneer who has helped define the field of personal genetics and has made 23andMe a unique and special place.
signature_quotes.context: Thanking early adopters for their role in building the personal genetics industry.

signature_quotes.text: We hope to have a life-long partnership with you as the field of genetics evolves and new discoveries are made.
signature_quotes.context: Explaining the ongoing value of the service beyond the initial DNA test.

signature_quotes.text: 23andMe brings the stories in your DNA to life.
signature_quotes.context: Describing the core value proposition of the company.
